Recurrence.description: Fires at 9:00 AM Philippine Time (Asia/Manila) on the 10th and 25th of every month.

Calculate_Payroll_Date.description: 10th trigger = payroll on 20th of same month. 25th trigger = payroll on 5th of next month.

Calculate_2PM_PHT_Timestamp.description: Calculates today's 2:00 PM PHT as a UTC-formatted timestamp for the Delay Until action.

Set_Image_URLs.description: Fixed raw GitHub URLs for the two reminder images. GitHub Actions commits fresh images to the repo at 8:30 AM PHT before this flow fires. These URLs always serve the latest committed version.

Post_Approval_Card_to_Nireen.description: Sends an Adaptive Card to Nireen via Teams DM with a message preview and Approve/Decline buttons. The flow pauses here until she responds.

body.messageBody: @{concat('{"type":"AdaptiveCard","$schema":"http://adaptivecards.io/schemas/adaptive-card.json","version":"1.4","msteams":{"width":"Full"},"body":[{"type":"Container","style":"emphasis","bleed":true,"items":[{"type":"TextBlock","text":"PAYROLL CUT-OFF REMINDER","weight":"Bolder","size":"Large","color":"Accent","wrap":true},{"type":"TextBlock","text":"Finance Team  |  Approval Required Before Broadcasting","size":"Small","isSubtle":true,"wrap":true}]},{"type":"TextBlock","text":"Hi Nireen,\\n\\nPlease review the payroll cut-off reminder below for the **', outputs('Calculate_Payroll_Date'), '** payroll. If everything looks good, click Approve and it will be broadcast to Smartees at 2:00 PM PHT today.","wrap":true,"spacing":"Medium"},{"type":"Container","style":"default","separator":true,"spacing":"Medium","items":[{"type":"TextBlock","text":"Preview - Message to Smartees:","weight":"Bolder","wrap":true,"size":"Medium"},{"type":"TextBlock","text":"Hi Smartees,\\n\\nThis is a quick reminder regarding the attendance cut-off schedule and approval for the **', outputs('Calculate_Payroll_Date'), '** payroll.\\n\\nTo ensure a smooth and timely payroll computation, strict compliance with the deadlines is a must.\\n\\nPlease also take note of the following reminders:\\n- Make sure your change of shift schedules are filed via Sprout Schedule Adjustment.\\n- Submit your Leave and Overtime requests accordingly.\\n- Review your logs via My Attendance under the Profile tab in Sprout. If you notice any missing logs due to valid reasons (e.g., system issues), please file a Certificate of Attendance as soon as possible.\\n\\nIf you are a bit late with your attendance filing, approvals, or payroll dispute submissions, your entries will be processed in the next payroll run, so stay on top of your attendance daily!\\n\\nThank you!","wrap":true,"size":"Small","color":"Default"}]},{"type":"FactSet","separator":true,"spacing":"Medium","facts":[{"title":"Payroll Date:","value":"', outputs('Calculate_Payroll_Date'), '"},{"title":"Broadcast Time:","value":"2:00 PM PHT (if approved)"},{"title":"Attachments:","value":"Auto-generated images attached below"}]},{"type":"Image","url":"', outputs('Set_Image_URLs')?['reminder1_url'], '","size":"Stretch","separator":true},{"type":"Image","url":"', outputs('Set_Image_URLs')?['cutoff_url'], '","size":"Stretch"}],"actions":[{"type":"Action.Submit","title":"Approve - Schedule Broadcast at 2 PM","style":"positive","data":{"action":"approve"}},{"type":"Action.Submit","title":"Decline - I will reply with corrections","style":"destructive","data":{"action":"decline"}}]}' )}
body.updateMessage: Thank you for your response! The flow will proceed accordingly.

Check_Approval_Response.description: Branches based on Nireen's response. 'approve' goes to broadcast; anything else goes to decline notification.

Delay_Until_2PM_PHT.description: Waits until 2:00 PM PHT before posting to the Teams channel. If Nireen approves after 2 PM, the flow continues immediately.

Post_Broadcast_to_Teams_Channel.description: Posts the full payroll cut-off reminder as an Adaptive Card to the designated Teams channel, including the two attached infographic images from SharePoint.

body.messageBody: @{concat('{"type":"AdaptiveCard","$schema":"http://adaptivecards.io/schemas/adaptive-card.json","version":"1.4","msteams":{"width":"Full"},"body":[{"type":"Container","style":"emphasis","bleed":true,"items":[{"type":"TextBlock","text":"Payroll Cut-off Reminder","weight":"Bolder","size":"ExtraLarge","wrap":true},{"type":"TextBlock","text":"Finance","size":"Medium","isSubtle":true,"wrap":true}]},{"type":"TextBlock","text":"Hi Smartees,","weight":"Bolder","size":"Medium","wrap":true,"spacing":"Medium"},{"type":"TextBlock","text":"This is a quick reminder regarding the attendance cut-off schedule and approval for the **', outputs('Calculate_Payroll_Date'), '** payroll.\\n\\nTo ensure a smooth and timely payroll computation, strict compliance with the deadlines is a must.","wrap":true},{"type":"TextBlock","text":"Please also take note of the following reminders:","weight":"Bolder","wrap":true,"spacing":"Medium"},{"type":"TextBlock","text":"- Make sure your change of shift schedules are filed via Sprout Schedule Adjustment.\\n- Submit your Leave and Overtime requests accordingly.\\n- Review your logs via My Attendance under the Profile tab in Sprout. If you notice any missing logs due to valid reasons (e.g., system issues), please file a Certificate of Attendance as soon as possible.","wrap":true},{"type":"TextBlock","text":"If you are a bit late with your attendance filing, approvals, or payroll dispute submissions, your entries will be processed in the next payroll run, so stay on top of your attendance daily!","wrap":true,"spacing":"Medium"},{"type":"TextBlock","text":"Thank you!","wrap":true,"spacing":"Medium"},{"type":"Image","url":"', outputs('Set_Image_URLs')?['reminder1_url'], '","size":"Stretch","separator":true,"spacing":"Medium"},{"type":"Image","url":"', outputs('Set_Image_URLs')?['cutoff_url'], '","size":"Stretch","spacing":"Small"}]}' )}

Notify_Nireen_Broadcast_Sent.description: Sends Nireen a confirmation that the broadcast was successfully posted to the Teams channel.

body.content:
Done! The payroll cut-off reminder for the @{outputs('Calculate_Payroll_Date')} payroll has been successfully broadcast to the Smartees Teams channel at 2:00 PM PHT.

No further action needed.

Notify_Nireen_Declined.description: Tells Nireen her decline was captured and asks her to reply with the corrections needed.

body.content:
You declined the payroll cut-off reminder broadcast for the @{outputs('Calculate_Payroll_Date')} payroll.

Please reply to this message with the corrections needed. Once the content is updated in SharePoint, you can manually re-run the flow from Power Automate, or it will run again automatically on the next scheduled date.
